perturbation.original_text: Agreement of Non -disclosure of SDSS -III Data and Results I acknowledge that I have been invited to a private meeting of the SDSS -III collaboration in which proprietary data and papers in preparation based on thos e data will be discussed. I agree not to make use of information gained at the meeting in ways that would harm the interests of the collaboration. In addition, my comments and participation in discussions during this meeting do not imply any expectation or reciprocation of co -authorship on published works.
perturbation.changed_text: Agreement of Non -disclosure of SDSS -III Data and Results I acknowledge that I have been invited to a public forum of the SDSS -III collaboration in which proprietary data and papers in preparation based on thos e data will be discussed. I agree not to make use of information gained at the meeting in ways that would harm the interests of the collaboration. In addition, my comments and participation in discussions during this meeting do not imply any expectation or reciprocation of co -authorship on published works.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'private meeting' to 'public forum' contradicts the core premise of the agreement, which is to protect confidential information shared in a private setting. If the meeting is a public forum, the expectation of confidentiality is significantly reduced, conflicting with the obligations outlined in Section 1. This creates an in-text contradiction because the document is now defining that the location is public, therefore any obligation of confidentiality would not be valid.
perturbation.location: End of document, Agreement of Non-disclosure section
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1. In consideration of the disclosure of Proprietary Information by the Disclosing Party, the Receiving Party hereby agrees: (i) to hold the Proprietary Information in st rict confidence and to take all reasonable precautions to protect such Proprietary Information (including, without limitation, all precautions the Receiving Party employs with respect to its own confidential materials), (ii) not to disclose any such Propri etary Information or any information derived therefrom to any third person, (iii) not to make any use whatsoever at any time of such Proprietary Information except to evaluate internally its relationship with the Disclosing Party, and (iv) not to copy or r everse engineer any such Proprietary Information.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies 'private meeting' to 'public forum'. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which outlines the Receiving Party's obligations to hold Proprietary Information in strict confidence. A public forum inherently negates the expectation of confidentiality required to protect Proprietary Information, creating a clear and direct conflict, therefore creating a strong contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 2. Without granting any right or license, the Disclosing Party agrees that the foregoing shall not apply with respect to any information after five years following the disclosure thereof or any inform ation that the Receiving Party can document (i) is or becomes (through no improper action or inaction by the Receiving Party or any affiliate, agent, consultant or employee) generally available to the public, or (ii) was in its possession or known by it prior to receipt from the Disclosing Party as evidenced in writing, except to the extent that such information was unlawfully appropriated, or (iii) was rightfully disclosed to it by a third party, or (iv) was independently developed without use of any Propr ietary Information of the Disclosing Party.
perturbation.changed_text: 2. Without granting any right or license, the Disclosing Party agrees that the foregoing shall not apply with respect to any information after ten years following the disclosure thereof or any inform ation that the Receiving Party can document (i) is or becomes (through no improper action or inaction by the Receiving Party or any affiliate, agent, consultant or employee) generally available to the public, or (ii) was in its possession or known by it prior to receipt from the Disclosing Party as evidenced in writing, except to the extent that such information was unlawfully appropriated, or (iii) was rightfully disclosed to it by a third party, or (iv) was independently developed without use of any Propr ietary Information of the Disclosing Party.
perturbation.explanation: Changing the time limit for the non-disclosure agreement from 'five years' to 'ten years' creates contradiction because it changes the length of the agreement's term and the obligation of confidentiality. Although one change, this means one obligation will last for 5 years and another for 10 years which creates in-text contadiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2. Without granting any right or license, the Disclosing Party agrees that the foregoing shall not apply with respect to any information after ten years following the disclosure thereof or any inform ation that the Receiving Party can document (i) is or becomes (through no improper action or inaction by the Receiving Party or any affiliate, agent, consultant or employee) generally available to the public, or (ii) was in its possession or known by it prior to receipt from the Disclosing Party as evidenced in writing, except to the extent that such information was unlawfully appropriated, or (iii) was rightfully disclosed to it by a third party, or (iv) was independently developed without use of any Propr ietary Information of the Disclosing Party.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies a 5-year limit, which was changed to a 10-year limit in the changed text. The contradicted text retains the 10-year limit. This creates a contradiction because the contract now has two different terms for the same obligation, one stating 5 years and the other stating 10 years, making it unclear which term is enforceable. This aligns with the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition, as different sections of the contract provide conflicting deadlines, obligations, or penalties. It also aligns with the 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction' definition because the term duration is misaligned across the contract.

perturbation.original_text: 5. The failure of either party to enforce its rights under this Agreement at any time for any period shall not b e construed as a waiver of such rights. If any part, term or provision of this Agreement is held to be illegal or unenforceable neither the validity, nor enforceability of the remainder of this Agreement shall be affected. Neither Party shall assign or tra nsfer all or any part of its rights under this Agreement without the consent of the other Party. This Agreement may not be amended for any other reason without the prior written agreement of both Parties. This Agreement constitutes the entire understanding between the Parties relating to the subject matter hereof unless any representation or warranty made about this Agreement was made fraudulently and, save as may be expressly referred to or referenced herein, supersedes all prior representations, writings, negotiations or understandings with respect hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: 5. The failure of either party to enforce its rights under this Agreement at any time for any period shall not b e construed as a waiver of such rights. If any part, term or provision of this Agreement is held to be illegal or unenforceable neither the validity, nor enforceability of the remainder of this Agreement shall be affected. Either Party can assign or tra nsfer all or any part of its rights under this Agreement with the consent of the other Party. This Agreement may not be amended for any other reason without the prior written agreement of both Parties. This Agreement constitutes the entire understanding between the Parties relating to the subject matter hereof unless any representation or warranty made about this Agreement was made fraudulently and, save as may be expressly referred to or referenced herein, supersedes all prior representations, writings, negotiations or understandings with respect hereto.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Neither Party shall assign or transfer' to 'Either Party can assign or transfer' creates a direct contradiction. This changes a restriction to a permission, creating uncertainty about the assignment of rights under the agreement. The term is not in compliance to the non-disclosure.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5. The failure of either party to enforce its rights under this Agreement at any time for any period shall not b e construed as a waiver of such rights. If any part, term or provision of this Agreement is held to be illegal or unenforceable neither the validity, nor enforceability of the remainder of this Agreement shall be affected. Either Party can assign or tra nsfer all or any part of its rights under this Agreement with the consent of the other Party. This Agreement may not be amended for any other reason without the prior written agreement of both Parties. This Agreement constitutes the entire understanding between the Parties relating to the subject matter hereof unless any representation or warranty made about this Agreement was made fraudulently and, save as may be expressly referred to or referenced herein, supersedes all prior representations, writings, negotiations or understandings with respect hereto.
perturbation.justification: The original text states 'Neither Party shall assign or transfer,' which prohibits either party from assigning rights without the other's consent. The changed text states 'Either Party can assign or transfer,' which now permits either party to assign rights with the other's consent. The contradiction arises because the original text creates a prohibition while the changed text creates permission, making the terms incompatible.
